name: transcribe-easy
description: Barrier-Free Meetings — Real-time offline speech transcription and translation
author: Mohcine El Harras

scripts.mobile:build: npm run build && npx cap sync
scripts.test: node --test --import tsx capacitor.config.test.ts server/audioPipeline.e2e.test.ts server/cors.test.ts server/runtimeConfig.test.ts server/translate.test.ts server/googleai.test.ts server/minimax.test.ts server/models.test.ts server/report.test.ts server/whisper.test.ts server/wsTranscribe.test.ts server/transcriptionSessionManager.test.ts server/deviceAudioCapture.test.ts server/offline-stt/transcriptAssembler.test.ts server/offline-stt/session.test.ts server/offline-stt/whisperConfig.test.ts server/offline-stt/transformersWhisperCache.test.ts server/offline-stt/transformersWhisperResult.test.ts src/config/runtime.test.ts src/config/transcriptionSupport.test.ts src/constants/languages.test.ts src/hooks/useHistory.test.ts src/hooks/usePreferences.test.ts src/hooks/mediaCapture.test.ts src/hooks/speechRecognitionController.test.ts src/hooks/whisperInterruption.test.ts src/hooks/whisperSocketProtocol.test.ts src/services/report.test.ts src/components/Sidebar.test.tsx src/components/HistoryPanel.test.tsx src/components/autoReportState.test.ts src/components/conversationLayout.test.ts src/components/reportActionState.test.ts src/App.test.tsx src/utils/languageMatcher.test.ts server/languageVerification.test.ts
